checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: Issue 126 follows the established apply-mode expansion pattern (119 → 123 → 126). merge operation added with PR auto-detection and --squash --auto flags. Pilot scope guard updated. Tests updated.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: gh pr view auto-detects PR number. gh pr merge --squash --auto executes. Pilot guard allows issue_close, pr_open, merge. ci_wait unsupported op test passes. command_boundary updated. All validators pass.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: Changes limited to scripts, docs, evidence, and artifacts. apply-mode merge bounded by 7 evidence gates and --auto flag (merge still requires CI). No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, or deployment files changed.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files within declared scope. No protected paths touched.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: All validators passed locally including full CLI test suite. apply-unsupported-op now correctly tests ci_wait and new boundary string.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: GitHub CI is pending for the issue 126 PR and remains an external merge gate. Final report marks CI as not_collected.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: Final report accurately records local completion pending PR CI without claiming post-merge facts.

findings.evidence: PR, CI, and merge for issue 126 are pending external GitHub gates.
findings.recommendation: Wait for CI, then merge if policy gates pass. Then proceed to issue 127 (full end-to-end apply-mode loop test).

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 126 branch.
